name: E-commerce & Retail

users.context: Browses, searches, compares, adds to cart, and checks out across mobile and desktop; tracks orders and returns. Impatient, distractible, price- and trust-sensitive; abandons at any friction.
users.expertise: Novice to intermediate; assumes nothing, decides in seconds, highly sensitive to surprise costs and checkout friction.

users.context: Manages catalog, pricing, promotions, collections, and on-site search/ranking. Curates the storefront to drive conversion and margin.
users.expertise: Expert in merchandising and pricing; works in bulk across many SKUs and variants.

users.context: Handles order issues, returns/refunds, address changes, and disputes. Needs a fast customer-and-order 360 to resolve in one contact.
users.expertise: Intermediate; needs efficient lookup, clear order/return state, and guarded refund actions.

users.context: Oversees order routing, inventory availability, shipping, and returns processing; manages oversell and stockouts across channels.
users.expertise: Expert in OMS/inventory and multi-channel fulfilment.

users.context: Handles buy-online-pickup-in-store, ship-from-store, and in-store lookups on a handheld. On the floor, frequently interrupted, scan-driven.
users.expertise: Intermediate; needs fast, scan-based, glanceable tools.

users.context: Runs campaigns, A/B tests, and funnel analysis; monitors conversion, AOV, and retention. Data-driven optimisation of the journey.
users.expertise: Expert in funnels, experimentation, and attribution.

workflows.name: Browse, search, and product discovery
steps: Search or filter and sort results
View product detail (variants, price, availability, reviews)
Add to cart or save for later

workflows.name: Checkout and payment
steps: Review cart and apply promo code
Enter or select shipping address and method
Show full price breakdown (tax, shipping, fees) before pay
Authenticate and pay (with SCA where required)

workflows.name: Returns, refunds, and exchanges (RMA)
steps: Customer initiates return within policy window

workflows.name: Catalog and pricing / promotion management
steps: Set price, tax class, and inventory

risks: Hidden costs (tax, shipping, fees) revealed late, causing cart abandonment or distrust
Overselling stock not actually available, leading to cancellations and angry customers
Payment failure or double-charge from a non-idempotent checkout
Wrong or expired price/promotion published (mispricing) at scale via bulk edit
Order placed against the wrong variant (size/colour) due to unclear selection
Refund issued to the wrong order/amount or without proper authorisation
Inaccessible checkout excluding shoppers using assistive technology (lost sales + legal risk)
Inventory desync across channels causing stockouts or oversell
Account takeover at login/checkout exposing saved payment and addresses
environment_constraints: Mobile-first, fast, distractible shoppers who abandon on friction
High-trust money-and-payment context with fraud and chargeback risk
Peak load spikes (sales, holiday, flash promotions)
Variable devices, networks, and assistive technologies for the public
Bulk catalog operations across thousands of SKUs
domain_patterns: Cart and multi-step checkout with full price breakdown before payment
Bulk catalog edit with preview and validation
audit_compliance: PCI-DSS for cardholder data (never store raw PAN/CVV; use tokenisation)
GDPR / CCPA for customer personal data and consent/cookies
PSD2 / strong customer authentication for EU payments
Consumer-protection price and tax transparency rules
Accessibility (ADA / WCAG 2.1 AA) for public storefronts
accessibility_concerns: WCAG 2.1 AA conformant storefront and especially checkout
Variant selection (size/colour) must not rely on colour/swatch alone
Price, error, and stock status conveyed with text, not colour only
Keyboard and screen-reader operable cart and checkout with clear labels/ARIA
Sufficient timeouts for OTP/payment steps with accessible fallbacks
Alt text on product imagery and accessible review content
anti_patterns: Revealing shipping/tax/fees only on the final step (drip pricing)
Forcing account creation before guest checkout
Showing in-stock and overselling instead of real-time availability
Variant chosen by colour swatch with no text/aria label
Non-idempotent submit allowing double orders/charges on retry
Colour-only price-drop, error, or stock indicators
Storing raw card data instead of tokenising via a compliant processor
Bulk price/promo edits with no preview or confirmation, risking mass mispricing
